summary: Iteration 16: Complete testing of Settings Page with vertical tabs, RBAC management, Dashboard customization, and Reports page with charts. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified. Fixed 2 permission bugs in backend (super_admin checks).

fixed_in_this_iteration.issue: create_role only checked for 'admin' role, not 'super_admin'
update_settings only checked for 'admin' or 'manager', not 'super_admin'

issues: Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility)

critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components in SettingsPage.jsx missing aria-describedby for accessibility - minor console warning
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (122 users, 17 divisions, 3 roles)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page fully functional with 8 vertical tabs. RBAC management allows Create/Update/Delete roles (except system roles). Dashboard customization with 8 widget toggles working. Reports page shows 4 summary cards and 4 charts with real data. Backend permission fix: super_admin now allowed to create roles and update settings.

1_Settings_Vertical_Tabs.details: All 8 tabs verified: General, Branding, Integrations, Notifications, Dashboard, Roles & Permissions, Page Settings, Data & Storage. Each has data-testid: settings-tab-{key}

2_Settings_General_Tab.details: Company Name, Tagline, Company Email, Phone, Timezone (Select), Currency (Select), Company Address (textarea), Save button all present and functional

3_Settings_RBAC_Tab.details: Shows 3 roles (admin, manager, employee) with permission matrix. 'New Role' button present. Each role shows 13 modules x 4 permissions (CRUD) with checkmarks/X marks

4_RBAC_Edit_Role_Dialog.details: Edit button opens dialog with description field and full permission matrix. Checkboxes for each module-permission combo. Save Role button works

5_RBAC_Create_Role.details: New Role dialog with name and description inputs. Create Role button creates new role successfully

6_Settings_Dashboard_Tab.details: 8 widget toggles found: Applications, Training, Expenses, Users, Tickets, Tasks, Quick Actions, Recent Activity. Save Preferences button works

7_Settings_Page_Settings_Tab.details: Toggle switches for each module (Dashboard, Bursary Applications, Training Applications, etc.) all present

8_Reports_Summary_Cards.details: 4 summary cards: Total Users (122), Applications (8), Total Expenses (R 10,300.00), Open Tickets (2)

9_Reports_Division_Pie_Chart.details: Users by Division pie chart shows 17+ divisions with labels and legend

10_Reports_Active_Inactive_Chart.details: Active vs Inactive Users donut chart showing 122 Active, 0 Inactive

11_Reports_Expense_Charts.details: Expenses by Type bar chart (Flights, Accommodation, Car Hire/Shuttle, Catering). Expenses by Applicant list with Grand Total
